word: H7698 - שֶׁגֶר - sheger - sheh'-ger - That cometh of

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁגר

Transliteration: sheger

Phonetic: sheh'-ger

BDB Definition:

  1. offspring, young or offspring of beasts

Origin: from an unused root probably meaning to eject

TWOT entry: 2329a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
